title: Hein Veldhuis
text: Home * People * Hein Veldhuis Hein Veldhuis , a Dutch computer chess aficionado, expert and collector of dedicated chess computers , and frequent participant of dedicated user tournaments organized by the CSVN as framework of their Dutch Open Computer Chess Championship , International CSVN Tournament and subsequent CSVN Programmers Tournament [1] . Hein Veldhuis hosts an excellent site with a database of mostly Dutch and German documents on chess computers, and the History of Dutch computer chess ("Zie ook") [2] . Photos [ edit ] Winners of the ICT 2007 users tournament: Hein Veldhuis , Ruud Martin , Rob van Son [3] External Links [ edit ] Schaakcomputer database van Hein Veldhuis Schaakcomputer database van Hein Veldhuis - Zie ook: History - Geschichte References [ edit ] ↑ Users tournament ↑ Schaakcomputer database van Hein Veldhuis ↑ CSVN Image from former ICT 2007 Photo Gallery Up one level
